hero.title1: Fast digital product launches for business.
hero.subtitle: We do not just ship pages. We launch working business flows: landing page, lead capture, Telegram/WhatsApp, payments, analytics, bots, dashboards or MVPs. First landing mockup in 3-4 hours, project estimate in 24 hours.

offerCards.title: Landing page in 48 hours
offerCards.note: For founders who need a sharp first screen and a live page fast, not endless briefing cycles.

offerCards.title: MVP in 4–8 weeks
offerCards.note: Web apps, dashboards, portals and internal tools with enough structure to launch without a rewrite.

offerCards.title: Founder-led, low-bureaucracy
offerCards.note: Direct communication, fixed stage pricing and quick feedback loops instead of agency theatre.

services.title: What businesses usually need
services.subtitle: We do not start with technology. First we find where you need leads, sales, visibility or automation, then build the right digital product.

ai.title: Less manual work
ai.desc: AI agents, scraping, data processing and automated actions where the team currently burns hours by hand.

telegram.title: Leads and service in messenger
telegram.desc: Telegram bots for leads, orders, notifications, reports and internal workflows without extra dashboards.
telegram.msg1: Hi. I'm your assistant. Ask me anything.

dashboards.title: Owner-level visibility
dashboards.desc: Owner dashboards, CRM, reports and integrations with iiko, 1C, spreadsheets or APIs so decisions are based on facts.
dashboards.label: Revenue

ecommerce.title: Sell directly
ecommerce.desc: Catalogs, checkout, Kaspi, cards, delivery, pickup and loyalty so the business depends less on intermediaries.

nativeApps.title: Customer experience on mobile
nativeApps.desc: iOS and Android, customer portals, push, maps, QR, payments and internal tools for teams.

sprint.title: Test an offer in 48 hours
sprint.desc: Landing page, form or Telegram/WhatsApp lead capture, basic analytics and a structure ready for ads or direct sales.

mvp.title: Validate a product idea
mvp.desc: MVP / SaaS with users, payments, logic and staged launch so the first budget is not burned before customers.

items.label: Entry offer
items.note: A concrete first step for teams who need something live now, not another deck.

items.label: Shipped proof
items.note: Loyalty SaaS launched from idea to production in 6 weeks with real customer flows.

items.label: Ops impact
items.note: Chicago Pizza combines direct orders, loyalty and iiko-connected operations in one system.

items.label: Internal systems
items.note: We also build owner tools that replace Excel chaos with reporting, pricing control and sync.

cases.title: Cases
cases.ctaNote: We take the mechanics from the relevant case and adapt them to your business, workflows and stack.

dospass.desc: A viral loyalty program that lives at a personal link. No app downloads, everything via WhatsApp. Customers earn stamps for purchases, referrals and Instagram stories - you grow your base without an ad budget. Works for cafes, salons, fitness studios, clinics.

details.overview: A viral loyalty program that lives at a personal link. No apps, no downloads - the customer opens a WhatsApp link and immediately sees their card: stamps, progress, rewards, missions. The business gets word-of-mouth growth without paying for ads. Currently live in several countries.
capabilities: Personal customer page at a unique link
Stamps for purchases, referrals, Instagram/TikTok stories
WhatsApp onboarding by phone - no signup
Two-sided referral program
Spin Wheel and daily rewards for retention
Reputation guard: happy customers go to Google/2GIS, unhappy ones straight to the owner
Gift cards with 0% commission
Automatic birthday greetings
outcomes: Launched in the UAE in 6 weeks from idea to production
Customer follows and stories instead of paid ads
Live in cafes, salons, fitness, clinics, retail

chicago.desc: Full stack: web, iOS, Android, admin panel and owner dashboard. Direct orders instead of aggregators, in-room QR payments (Apple Pay / Kaspi / card), points for every purchase and viral action - all wired into iiko.

details.overview: We built Chicago Pizza their own tech platform - the pizzeria no longer pays aggregator commissions, accepts in-room payments by QR, owns its customer base and earns points for every touchpoint: delivery, dine-in, takeout and viral actions. All synced with iiko in real time.
capabilities: Web app and native iOS/Android for direct orders
In-room QR payments: Apple Pay, Kaspi, bank cards
Unified loyalty: points for dine-in, delivery, takeout
Viral rewards: points for stories, reviews and invited friends
5% cashback on direct orders instead of aggregators
Admin panel: menu, prices, photos, availability, promos
Owner dashboard: sales, ops metrics, reports
Full iiko integration: orders, customers, stock, receipts
Separate flow for corporate catering and leads
Customer segmentation and targeted promos
outcomes: Lower dependency on aggregators and their fees
All sales channels rolled into one loyalty program
Direct access to the customer base and every touchpoint
Single point of control for ops, marketing and growth

restopulse.desc: Telegram-first reporting for restaurants on iiko: sales, payments, cancellations, suppliers, dishes, shifts, discounts, delivery and clear owner actions without opening another dashboard.

details.overview: RestoPulse came from a real Chicago Pizza need: the owner needed a short daily Telegram brief, not another admin panel. The service pulls iiko data and builds an owner report: sales, payments, cancellations, suppliers, shifts, dishes, discounts, delivery, comparisons and actions for today.
capabilities: Daily, weekly, monthly, MTD and YTD owner reports in Telegram
Sales, orders, average check, channels and every payment type with totals
Cancelled orders with possible nearby paid orders of similar time and amount
Suppliers: invoices, payments, services, top purchased goods, average prices and price jumps
Dishes: top 10 and weak 10 items by revenue and quantity
Staff and shifts: who clocked in, who is on shift, who finished and when they worked
Discounts, delivery, demand hours, locations and aggregator commission
Detail buttons directly inside Telegram: channels, payments, cancellations, suppliers, dishes, shifts, discounts, delivery, hours, locations
Owner advice with evidence, action and a metric to watch tomorrow
outcomes: The owner sees key numbers without opening iiko
Fewer manual manager reports and fewer blind spots across payments, cancellations and purchases
Faster detection of sales drops, delivery issues, suspicious cancellations or supplier price jumps
Format can be adapted for restaurant groups using iiko

mmg.desc: Internal platform for Medical Marketing Group: catalog, customer-tier pricing, tenders, 1C sync, FX risk and role-based access for the owner and managers.

details.overview: An internal operations platform for Medical Marketing Group in Kazakhstan. We replaced Excel and WhatsApp with one system - roles, business rules for pricing, and automatic 1C sync.
capabilities: Product catalog with USD/EUR purchase and KZT sales
Server-side pricing per customer tier: state, private, VIP, distributor
Daily National Bank FX rates and VAT in cost
Margin alerts when FX moves (re-order risk)
Medical tender monitoring via tenderbot.kz
1C data sync via AgentMail email attachments
Role-based access: the owner sees margin and team activity, managers see only allowed prices
Daily owner report + action audit log
Trilingual interface: Russian, Kazakh, English
outcomes: Real-time visibility into ops and sales
Fewer manual errors and lost data
Safe access split with no margin leak

whatsapp.desc: A reusable desktop operator workspace we adapt per client: multiple WhatsApp accounts in one app, AI suggestions based on chat context, draft rewrite into ready-to-send replies, and a knowledge base attached to each account.

details.overview: Originally built for Chicago Pizza, then shaped into a reusable desktop tool for operators and customer support teams. Multiple WhatsApp accounts run side by side in one app with persistent sessions, fast switching, unread badges, and an AI panel that suggests replies from the live conversation plus the docs attached to that specific account.
capabilities: Multiple WhatsApp accounts running simultaneously in one app
Persistent sessions, unread badges, color coding and hotkeys for switching
3 AI reply suggestions based on the current conversation context
Rewrite mode: the operator types rough notes, AI returns 3 polished reply options
Tone modes: auto, formal, casual, brief
Conversation summaries for long threads and shift handoffs
Per-account knowledge base: PDF, XLSX, DOCX, markdown/text files and URLs
Per-account AI instructions plus automatic instruction improvement from real conversations
outcomes: One operator workspace instead of many browser tabs and windows
More consistent replies across operators and shifts
Faster onboarding when menus, FAQs and internal docs are attached to the account
AI stays grounded in the account context instead of replying generically

fastLaunch.title: Landing page in 48 hours
fastLaunch.guarantee: Not just design. Page, offer, lead capture and launch.
fastLaunch.subtitle: For ads, a new service, a promo or demand testing. First mockup in 3-4 hours. If the first mockup misses the task, you do not pay for the sprint.
fastLaunch.bullet1: Structure for lead, booking or purchase
fastLaunch.bullet2: Telegram / WhatsApp / form as the entry point
logLines: Wireframes approved. Proceeding to visual design.
Design system locked. Handoff to engineering.

steps.title: Request
steps.desc: Message us on Telegram or email. Share the task, goal and timing in any format that is convenient.

steps.title: Estimate
steps.desc: We clarify the context, ask the right follow-up questions and come back with a clear estimate or range. If needed, we jump on a short call already with context.

steps.title: Prototype
steps.desc: We assemble the structure and logic. Approve the foundation.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: We code. Fast, clean, with weekly demos for larger projects.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Production deploy. Domain and analytics wired up.

steps.title: Support
steps.desc: A month of bug fixes free. After that - as needed.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no inflated estimates.

testimonials.title: What people say
testimonials.subtitle: Reviews about launch speed and processes that work - not abstract "nice to work with" lines.
testimonials.ctaTitle: The next step is to discuss the task in Telegram.
testimonials.ctaNote: Send the task, timeline and desired outcome. We will clarify context fast, give you an estimate and jump on a call only if it helps move faster.

quotes.quote: We took DosPass from zero to a working product in 6 weeks. The team really got into the problem - not just code, they suggested solutions we hadn't thought of. The platform now runs in three countries.
quotes.author: Vladimir B.

quotes.quote: We needed a Telegram bot for orders and a POS integration. Done in 2 weeks, running smoothly for over a year. Support replies fast - that's rare with developers.
quotes.author: Asel S.

quotes.quote: We got the first mockup four hours after the call. Honestly shocking. The final site went live the next day - conversion tripled compared to the old one.
quotes.author: Maxim A.

items.a: We work on 50% upfront and 50% on successful delivery. For larger projects we can split the work into stages or sprints.

items.q: Do we need a call right away?
items.a: No. A short message on Telegram or email is enough to start. We collect context in chat first and suggest a call only if it will actually speed things up.

items.q: What do you need from me to start?
items.a: The goal, timing, examples and anything you already have. A polished brief, mockups or a full spec are not required.

items.q: Do you only work in Kazakhstan?
items.a: Kazakhstan is our main market, but we can take projects from other countries. Payment, documents and workflow are agreed per project.

items.q: Why so fast (a landing page in 48 hours)?
items.a: We have a tight delivery process, our own UI component library and short approval loops. For a standard landing with ready content and fast feedback, 48 hours is realistic.
No. We write code (React, Next.js, Tailwind, Node.js). That gives full freedom in design, animation, integrations and load-time optimization.

ctaSection.title: Ready to ship?
ctaSection.subtitle: Message us on Telegram or email. We will clarify details fast, give a budget range and jump on a call if needed.
